title: Language Change - Checking pop up if at least one component is at low battery
scenario: Language change firmware update blocked with low battery pop-up on headset, earbud, or smart case
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and select your connected Poly audio device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Language.
4. Attempt to change the language setting, which triggers a firmware update.
5. Observe the pop-up message that appears when any component (headset, earbud, or smart case) has a low battery.
expected: The firmware update should proceed normally if all components have sufficient battery. If any component has low battery, a pop-up should appear: \"Update currently not available, please try back later\".
